# HospitalityApp

> The all-in-one operations app for independent UK hospitality — pubs, bars, restaurants, cafés, coffee shops, hotels and B&Bs. One app for staff rota, compliance records, till/POS, kitchen display, menu, clock-in, daily takings and payroll-ready timesheets. Built for owner-operators, not enterprise chains.

HospitalityApp is a UK SaaS product. The marketing site is hospitalityapp.co.uk; the product itself runs at my.hospitalityapp.co.uk (iOS, Android and web). Pricing is per venue, per month, with a free trial: Essentials £49, Professional £99, Complete · Venue OS £149, plus an optional Till add-on (POS + KDS) £59. There are no per-terminal or per-user fees.

## What it does
- Staff rota & shift scheduling: drag-and-drop rota, role chips, open shifts, staff availability, shift-swap requests with manager approval, shift offers, time-off and holiday tracking.
- Clock-in: photo or 4-digit PIN clock-in to deter buddy-punching; ad-hoc clock-in; timesheets reconcile against the rota.
- Compliance records: food safety/HACCP with photo evidence, fridge/cellar temperature logs, alcohol-licensing records and refusal logs, fire safety, allergens, health & safety — all photo-evidenced and export-ready for inspectors.
- Till / POS: counter and table service for pubs, bars, restaurants and cafés; half/pint and measure pricing; per-item VAT; email receipts.
- Kitchen display (KDS): station routing and prep tickets.
- Menu management across till and dine-in channels.
- Takings & labour: daily takings entry, labour-cost percentage, payroll-ready timesheet CSV export.
- Team comms: noticeboard, broadcasts, direct messages, push notifications.
- Daily task checklists: opening, mid-shift and closing routines.
- Multi-site dashboard and reports.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://hospitalityapp.co.uk/): overview and primary features.
- [Features](https://hospitalityapp.co.uk/features): full feature list by area.
- [Pricing](https://hospitalityapp.co.uk/pricing): plans, the Till add-on, and FAQs.
